data.title: Thailand’s Ministry of Finance plans to issue $150 million in digital investment tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Thai Finance Minister Pichai Chunhavajira announced that the government plans to issue 5 billion baht (about 150 million US dollars) of digital investment tokens G-Token to raise public funds. The issuance is seen as a step to "test the waters" in the market and aims to explore the application of digital assets in public debt management. Chunhavajira said that investors can participate with smaller amounts and get returns higher than bank deposits. The plan has been approved by the cabinet, marking Thailand's further exploration in the field of digital finance. (CoinDesk)

data.title: French minister to meet crypto firms after kidnapping attempt
data.description:
The French interior minister reportedly plans to meet cryptocurrency professionals in the aftermath of a violent kidnapping attempt on the family of a crypto exchange executive in Paris. According to a May 14 France24 report, French interior minister Bruno Retailleau has invited crypto professionals to meet him after a brazen attempt to kidnap the daughter and grandson of Pierre Noizat, the co-founder and CEO of French crypto exchange Paymium. ”I will assemble businesspeople working in cryptocurrencies, and we have a few of those in France, at the interior ministry to work with them on their security,” Retailleau reportedly told the Europe 1/CNews broadcaster. On Tuesday, May 13, three masked men attacked Noizat’s daughter while she was walking in Paris’ 11th district with a man and her son
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/france-crypto-security-talks-kidnap-paymium?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A certain whale address sold 197.1 WBTC in the past half hour in exchange for 20.444 million USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst Yu Jin, a whale address sold 197.1 WBTC on the chain for 20.444 million USDT in the past half hour, with a selling price of 103,697 US dollars. The address withdrew 197.1 WBTC from OKX to the on-chain address half an hour ago, and then sold it for USDT and transferred it back to OKX.

data.title: JPMorgan’s Kinexys Connects With Public Blockchain on Ondo Chain Testnet Debut
data.description:
JPMorgan (JPM) took its first step onto a public blockchain network through its Kinexys Digital Payments platform, settling a tokenized U.S. Treasury transaction on Ondo Chain’s testnet.The pilot, detailed in a press release shared with CoinDesk, marks the debut of a Delivery versus Payment (DvP) transaction on the testnet, a new layer-1 blockchain designed to support institutional-grade real-world assets
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/05/14/jpmorgans-kinexys-connects-with-public-blockchain-on-ondo-chain-testnet-debut

data.title: CFTC Commissioner Mersinger exits to lead Blockchain Association as CEO
data.description:
One of the CFTC's chiefs, Summer Mersinger, is set to leave that agency and take on a new role — CEO of the Blockchain Association.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/354307/cftc-commissioner-mersinger-exits-to-lead-blockchain-association-as-ceo?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 915 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 1979 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 915 BTC today, of which Fidelity had an outflow of 873 BTC. Fidelity currently holds 198,247 BTC, worth US$20.6 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 1,979 ETH, of which Grayscale ETHE had an outflow of 3,983 ETH. Grayscale ETHE currently holds 1,129,089 ETH, worth US$2.94 billion.

data.title: U.S. CFTC Commissioner Summer Mersinger Plans to Resign and Become CEO of Blockchain Association
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Summer Mersinger, a member of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), has announced her resignation and will serve as CEO of the Blockchain Association, a blockchain industry lobbying organization. Mersinger has served as a CFTC commissioner since 2022, during which time she has actively advocated for clear regulatory rules for crypto assets and advocated that the CFTC have greater regulatory authority in the field of digital assets. This personnel change is seen as the latest move by the crypto industry to seek greater policy influence in Washington. (The Block)

data.title: Chainlink and Partners Successfully Complete Cross-Chain DvP Test Transaction
data.description: According to Odaily, Chainlink, Kinexys, a blockchain business under JPMorgan, and Ondo Finance, a platform for tokenizing real-world assets, have announced the successful completion of a cross-chain Delivery versus Payment (DvP) test transaction. In this transaction, the Kinexys digital payment network provided a permissioned blockchain network for account deposits used in payment settlements. Ondo's blockchain offered a next-generation Layer 1 blockchain designed to expand the tokenization of real-world assets, along with its flagship product, the tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund (OUSG). The DvP solution coordinated asset and payment movements, with end-to-end support provided by the Chainlink Runtime Environment (CRE).

data.title: Tether Announces Launch of QuantumVerse Automatic Computer
data.description:
According to Odaily, Tether has announced the upcoming launch of the QuantumVerse Automatic Computer (QVAC), a smart development platform designed for both humans and machines. This platform enables highly scalable AI applications and agents to operate directly on local devices, eliminating the need for centralized services and cloud infrastructure. This approach aims to protect users from corporate access to private user data.

Tether is set to introduce its first AI applications based on QVAC, focusing on privacy protection and autonomous sovereignty. The initial applications include QVAC/Translate, which allows for rapid transcription and translation of text, documents, images, and audio directly on devices without relying on cloud services. Another application, QVAC/Health, is a private health tracker that fully localizes sensitive health data.

Additionally, Tether plans to open-source a comprehensive software development kit in the coming months. This will enable developers to easily build, deploy, and scale their own QVAC agents on any device.

data.title: Squads receives strategic investment from Haun Ventures and plans to launch a stablecoin native account
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana Ecosystem Multi-Signature Protocol Squads announced that it has received strategic investment from Haun Ventures, and the specific amount has not been disclosed. In addition, Squads also announced that it will soon launch the stablecoin native account Altitude, allowing companies to open and fund US dollar accounts without relying on traditional banks or US entities. (Blockworks)

data.title: A whale transferred 1 million TRUMP to Binance 30 minutes ago and made a profit of $2.51 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, a whale who bought TRUMP at a recent low point transferred 1 million TRUMP (US$13.37 million) to Binance 30 minutes ago, making a profit of US$2.51 million.
He withdrew these 1 million TRUMP from Binance on 5/6 at a price of US$10.86, which is near the lowest point since the TRUMP dinner plan.
30 minutes ago, he transferred these 1 million TRUMP to Binance at a price of US$13.37, and finally realized a profit of US$2.51 million.

data.title: BNB Price Eyes $700 Breakout Amid VanEck Tokenized Fund Launch
data.description:
Key Insights: Amid a general market shift, BNB price is in the spotlight as it eyes a potential breakout on a key utility boost. Exchange-traded fund (ETF) issuer VanEck has inked a strategic partnership with Securitize, a leader in Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/14/bnb-price-eyes-700-breakout-amid-vaneck-tokenized-fund-launch/
